description: MCP server for Rekko AI prediction market intelligence — 25 tools for AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf).
rules: Install via: uvx rekko-mcp or pip install rekko-mcp
Requires REKKO_API_KEY environment variable for authentication
Analysis tools use async trigger-poll-retrieve pattern — call analyze, poll status, then get result
All tool functions are async and return JSON strings
